creator: Armstrong, Moses Kimball, 1832-1906
description: Early history of Dakota Territory.--Natural resources of the northwest territories as seen in 1866.--Early elections.--Pioneer legislatures and Indian wars.--Sketches of travel and early hardships.--Sketches of Congress and western empire.--Speeches in Congress on behalf of the West.--After a quarter of a century; two capitals: Washington and Richmond.--Racy sketches of southern life
subject: Frontier and pioneer life -- Northwestern States
Dakota Territory -- History
Northwestern States
title: The early empire builders of the great West
